package.name: pnc_nav_sim
package.description: Classic-Gazebo simulation layer for PNC Nav2: navigation test worlds (multi_floor, simple_maze), reusable sensor xacro macros (Livox Mid360, IMU), a lightweight diff-drive validation robot, and a Go2 model that reuses the upstream go2_description meshes while driving with the classic planar_move plugin. Robot dynamics/locomotion are out of scope here — this package only provides the simulated environment + sensors that feed the pnc_nav stack.
